scenario: A-1 Skyraider, airborne at 100 m, pitch=0, throttle=1, RAW tier, flat terrain far below, 30 s window, first 2 s skipped

deltas.note: Exit criterion was >= 50% vsRms reduction — met.

cruiseStep.scenario: airborne at 500 m, v2*1.3 forward speed, +0.5 elevator step, 2 s window, time to reach 10 deg pitch
cruiseStep.note: The smoothstep(5, 12) window leaves the early pitch transient at baseline damping. Response time identical to baseline.

cruiseAltHold.scenario: 200 m airborne, 50 m/s, neutral stick, assist tier, 5 s (fixedWing integration test)
cruiseAltHold.note: PD transient vy peaks at ~2.5 m/s, below the 5 m/s smoothstep floor, so climb damper is inactive here.

pitchRelease.scenario: 55 m/s airborne, 0.15 pitch for 0.5 s then neutral, assist tier, 5 s (fixedWing integration test)
pitchRelease.note: PD-recapture transient vy peaks at ~6.6 m/s. Within the smoothstep window (5→12), but the partial damping boost only adds ~1 m overshoot.

fix: climbFactor = smoothstep(velocity.y, 5, 12); pitchDamp *= 1 + climbFactor * 1.5. Applied to pitchAccel term in integrateAir. Cruise and brief PD transients unaffected (climbFactor=0 at vy<=5 m/s); 2.5x damping at vy>=12 m/s sustained climb.
